scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n web,api -c blue,green "npm -w web run dev" "npm -w api run start:dev"
scripts.dev:full: npm run infra:up && concurrently --kill-others-on-fail -n web,api,worker -c blue,green,magenta "npm -w web run dev" "npm -w api run start:dev" "npm -w worker run dev"
scripts.infra:up: docker compose up -d postgres redis minio minio-init
scripts.infra:logs: docker compose logs -f postgres redis minio minio-init
scripts.github:bootstrap: npm run github:labels && npm run github:milestones && npm run issues:seed
scripts.github:bootstrap:apply: npm run github:labels:apply && npm run github:milestones:apply && npm run issues:seed:apply
scripts.lint: npm -w api run lint && npm -w web run lint && npm -w web run stylelint && npm -w worker run lint
scripts.test: npm -w api test && npm -w web test && npm -w worker test
scripts.verify: npm run format:check && npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run build
scripts.prepare: node -e "try { require.resolve('husky'); process.exit(1); } catch { process.exit(0); }" || husky
